scripts.sync:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp ../flash6.html www/index.html && cp ../flash6.html ../flash6.js ../overlay.html ../manifest.webmanifest www/ && cp -R ../scripts ../styles ../img ../vendor ../mp3 ../tiles ../3d www/ && find www \( -name .DS_Store -o -name '*.textClipping' -o -name '* 2.*' \) -delete && xattr -cr www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync
scripts.ios:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ANDROID_HOME=/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools ./gradlew assembleDebug
